entries.change_body: Twilio Messaging logoMay 12, 2026MessagingT-Mobile A2P 10DLC Daily Limit Warning Error Codes 30025, 30026, and 30027 Being DecommissionedStarting May 21, 2026, T-Mobile A2P 10DLC daily message cap warning error codes30025(50% threshold),30026(70% threshold), and30027(100% of the daily limit) are being retired. entries.version_or_date: Conversation Relay Insights is now Generally Available (GA)
entries.change_title: Conversation Relay Insights is now Generally Available (GA)
entries.change_body: Twilio Programmable Voice logoMay 06, 2026GAVoice APIConversation Relay Insights is now Generally Available (GA)Conversation Relay Insights provides the observability to confidently build and scale your Voice AI agents. By analyzing end-to-end conversational signals—like latency, interruptions, and handling time—the dashboard highlights exactly where your agents excel at natural turn-taking and where friction may be emerging. This visibility allows teams to replicate high-performing interaction

entries.change_body: Twilio logoMay 06, 2026GAReal-time Conversation Intelligence is now generally availableConversation Intelligenceis now generally available with real-time, cross-channel support. entries.version_or_date: Twilio Agent Connect is now generally available
entries.change_title: Twilio Agent Connect is now generally available
entries.change_body: Twilio logoMay 06, 2026GATwilio Agent Connect is now generally availableTwilio Agent Connect is now generally available with multi-channel support. Agent Connect is a Python and TypeScript SDK that simplifies building AI-powered conversational agents with persistent memory and conversation orchestration—connecting your LLM application to Twilio's communication channels.This release includes:• Multi-channel orchestration: Built-in support for Voice, SMS, chat, WhatsApp, and RCS with unified callb

Agent Connect is a Python and TypeScript SDK that simplifies building AI-powered conversational agents with persistent memory and conversation orchestration—connecting your LLM application to Twilio's communication channels.This release includes:• Multi-channel orchestration: Built-in support for Voice, SMS, chat, WhatsApp, and RCS with unified callbacks• Conversation Orchestrator integration: Automatic conversation trac

entries.version_or_date: Twilio Conversation Memory is Now Generally Available
entries.change_title: Twilio Conversation Memory is Now Generally Available
entries.change_body: Twilio logoMay 06, 2026GATwilio Conversation Memory is Now Generally AvailableTwilio Conversation Memory helps AI and human agents remember key facts, past conversations, and customer preferences so they can deliver more personalized responses. By feeding the AI agent only relevant context, Conversation Memory helps maintain agent performance while lowering token usage and response latency. As a result, every conversation can build on the last instead of starting from scratch.Learn more

entries.version_or_date: Twilio Enterprise Knowledge is Now Generally Available
entries.change_title: Twilio Enterprise Knowledge is Now Generally Available
entries.change_body: Twilio logoMay 06, 2026GATwilio Enterprise Knowledge is Now Generally AvailableTwilio Enterprise Knowledge is generally available. It enables agents to pull business context into conversations from unstructured sources such as knowledge bases, company policies, and documentation, helping them answer customer questions with greater accuracy and relevance.Learn more

entries.version_or_date: Conversation Relay now supports Deepgram Flux + New Features
entries.change_title: Conversation Relay now supports Deepgram Flux + New Features
entries.change_body: Twilio Conversation relay iconMay 06, 2026Conversation RelayVoice APIConversation Relay now supports Deepgram Flux + New FeaturesEnhance your voice agents with Deepgram’s Flux model for better turn-taking and fewer interruptions. This update also introduces new TwiML attributes for precise conversation flow control and a dedicated suite of error codes for easier debugging.Learn more
